full_text:
Bian Lan 卞蘭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bian Lan (卞蘭)was born in Langye. Close to both Cao Pi and Cao Rui, an honest advisor. Suffered from diabetes. Bian Lan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Bian Lan lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
